components.description: MCU module with USB-C, LiPo charger, JST-PH battery pads
Leak probe connector (stainless probes, sensor strip, or float switch)
Pull-down on leak sense pin, keeps wake pin LOW when dry
Local alarm, fires before WiFi handshake completes
Battery, charged by U1 over USB-C

nets.name: 3V3
nets.note: Probe A is energized; 1M pull-down limits standing current to ~3.3 uA when wet

nets.name: LEAK_SENSE
nets.note: Deep sleep wake pin, wakes on HIGH when water bridges the probes

nets.name: VBAT
nets.note: Divider draws ~21 uA continuously; acceptable against 30 uA sleep floor

nets.name: BAT_SENSE
nets.note: ADC reads half of VBAT; attenuation 12db in firmware
